svg.title: Marin Cognitive Architecture — LangGraph flow diagram
svg.desc: Four-node cyclic LangGraph graph: Strategist → Executor → Auditor (with fail loop back to Executor) → Persona → Operator output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the input node do in Marin?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Strategist node in Marin')
sendPrompt('What tools does the Executor node use in Marin?')
g.text: ReAct core · picks tool · executes step

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Marin Filter auditor node work?')
g.text: no tools — pure logic on state
checks math · flags fluff · sets technical_verification

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Persona layer do in Marin?')
g.text: wraps truth in personality · Hehehe~~ · Ummaaah~~!

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the final output of the Marin graph?')
